steps.title: Apply the cross-multiplication from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $7x^{2} = 42$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Multiplying both sides of the given equation by $x$ yields $42=7{x}^{2}$. Therefore, the value of $7{x}^{2}$ is $42$.
